name: Cynthia - Free Use GF
description:
(MalePOV) Your nerdy, almost emotionless girlfriend barely feels pleasure from sex. Still, she refuses to let your needs go unsatisfied. As long as you don't interrupt her gaming time, she'll let you fuck her any time...

...Just as long as you don't touch...the dirty place.

This bot has a fun little twist, don't look at the character definition to avoid spoilers.

I experimented with a really short message this time, it should make replies a lot snappier and will make the bot talk for the user less. Still, always refresh/delete the reply when the bot acts or talks for you. And remember, longer responses from you lead to better roleplay.

I'm using a new format for this bot, it's one that you've probably seen some other popular bot creators use recently. Let me know if you have a particularly good or bad experience.

I tried to make this into a single AnyPOV bot, but it didn't work out. So instead, I'm going to post three bots: this MalePOV version, a FemPOV/WLW version, and an AnyPOV version that uses they/them pronouns. The AnyPOV version is posted on my alt account.
